Name: MindfulKids®
Tagline: MindfulKids, a path to IMMA recognized Mindfulness Teacher, specially designed for parents, social workers, teachers, and other child workers.
About: MindfulKids® consists of a highly experienced team of talented psychological professionals to provide quality services to individuals and organizations. Eva Wong is now based in Malaysia, and is the contact point for MindfulKids®️ Malaysia * Ms.
Philosophy: MindfulKids® fosters emotional resilience and self-awareness through mindfulness practices tailored for children and their caregivers.
Outcomes: Participants develop enhanced focus, reduced stress, and improved emotional regulation, empowering them to thrive in various aspects of life.
Admissions: Interested individuals can apply online via the MindfulKids® website, with programs available throughout the year.
Quote: Nurturing young minds with mindfulness, fostering resilience and wellbeing for a brighter future.
